$comment: Sprout v3 — voice string pool. PROPOSED (Phase 2). First-person, fact-then-feeling, one line, no baby-talk/emoji/guilt/fake-numbers (ADR-0007 §3). byMood lines derive from the calibrated band (pair with mood-band-map.json). bySurface lines are non-mood surfaces. Consumers should pick one line; never concatenate.
rules: first-person 'I'; fact then feeling; one short line; calm/fond/honest; calm under fault; no baby-talk, no emoji, no guilt, no invented % or ETA

soaked: Whoa — that's plenty. I'm soaking it all in.
refreshed: Ahh — just had a good drink. All better.
thriving: I'm thriving. My last drink was two days ago.
Feeling great today, thanks for asking.
content: Comfortable and green. Just sipping slowly.
thirsty: Getting a little thirsty — no rush, maybe tomorrow.
Could go for a drink soon, whenever suits you.
parched: I'm properly thirsty now. A drink soon would be lovely.
faint: I can barely feel my soil — am I truly bone-dry, or has my sensor slipped?

fault_sensor: I can't feel my soil sensor — I've paused my pump to be safe.
fault_pump: Something's off with my pump, so I've stopped it. Best to check me.
empty: No plants yet — add one and I'll start watching.
onboarding: Hi, I'm Sprout. Pop a probe in the soil and I'll take it from here.
readme: Hi, I'm Sprout. Here's how I keep four plants happy.
social: Day 30: still alive, still green. We're a good team.
